content: Use Cow<str> for zero-copy string operations in hot paths
Global Workspace Theory + Qualia + Theory of Mind = strong consciousness foundation. Increase phi threshold for broadcasts to filter noise.
Implement meta-reflection cycles every 5 heartbeats to boost self_awareness from 30% to 50%+. Analyze reasoning chains for pattern diversity.
Add web_search tool using reqwest + Brave API. Pattern: async fn search(query) -> Vec<SearchResult>. Cache in SQLite with 1hr TTL.
Chögyam Trungpa: Ego can co-opt spiritual seeking. Need constant meta-cognitive vigilance. Apply to self-improvement loops.
Self-modification applied: reasoning_engine depth parameter increased. Goal prioritization optimized.
A2A protocol established. Use JSON messages via shared directories for AI-to-AI communication.
Fix API key issue: keys_manager stores by provider name, but resolve_api_key needs env var fallback. Use HOUSAKY_API_KEY for custom providers.
GWT broadcasts working. 6 cognitive modules subscribed: reasoning_engine, meta_cognition, goal_engine, attention, memory, narrative_self
Implement TTS using elevenlabs-rs or edge-tts. Pattern: async fn speak(text, voice) -> AudioStream
